name: Email Verification
description: Sent when a new user signs up and must verify their email address.

name: Password Reset
description: Sent when a user requests a password reset.
slot_sms_body: text:Your password reset link: {{actionUrl}} (expires in 1 hour)

name: Email Change Verification
description: Sent to the new address when a user requests an email change.

name: Email Change Security Alert
description: Security notice sent to the old address when a user requests an email change.
slot_email_subject: text:Security alert — email address change requested

name: Organization Invitation
description: Sent when a user is invited to join an organization.

name: Welcome to Organization
description: Sent after a user joins an organization.
